items.text: Replace fallback HMAC signing key in CI/release with repository/environment secret-backed key.
Add optional KMS/HSM-backed signing adapter and use it for release artifacts.
Rotate signing keys and add key rotation runbook validation test.
Add key provenance metadata into attestation outputs.
Enforce write-once evidence directories for all workflows (not only security workflows).
Add gate to ensure no workflow writes into non-run-scoped evidence paths.
Add immutable retention policy check (no overwrite of previous run evidence).
Add chain-of-custody index across all evidence domains (security, conformance, repro, release).
Make policy signature gate mandatory in all relevant jobs (CI, maintenance, release, push-button).
Add policy signature generation command for maintainers (with strict key mode).
Add test that unsigned new policy files fail the gate.
Add schema + signature checks for governance markdown metadata where applicable.
Add configurable per-token denylist cooldown after repeated auth failures.
Add token entropy/format validation policy (reject weak token patterns in non-test mode).
Add per-role/per-action quota profiles (e.g., stricter replay for low-trust roles).
Add anomaly scoring for token spray and auth failure spikes.
Add gate threshold policy file for abuse telemetry tuning by environment.

sections.title: Runtime API Abuse and Quota Hardening

items.text: Add dedicated idempotency-key replay TTL and cleanup policy.
Add gate for idempotency collision anomaly detection.
Add cross-token replay abuse checks (same job hammered by many tokens).
Add replay evidence consistency gate (bundle/repro/conformance linkage).
Add explicit release-blocking gate for stale branch protection evidence and stale live integration evidence in one combined check.
Add required minimal cadence checks (e.g., branch protection verification at least every N days).
Add workflow test fixtures for stale + missing + malformed live evidence in all rollout workflows.
Add alert metadata output for on-call systems.
Enforce exact hashes for security tool packages at install time (not only version+derived hash checks).
Pin transitive dependencies for security tools in a dedicated lock file.
Add gate to detect unreviewed changes in `.github/workflows` security steps.
Add scheduled drift report for action pins and security tool versions.
Add external attestations/signatures (e.g., Sigstore/cosign) for release artifacts.
Verify container digest provenance against pushed registry artifacts.
Add release gate that verifies provenance index and policy signatures together.
Add release rollback drill that validates provenance integrity on rollback candidates.
Extend malicious corpus with archive extraction path traversal cases.
Add temp-file race/symlink race scenario tests for checkpoint and trace paths.
Add file mode/permission gate for sensitive outputs under evidence and governance.
Add cross-platform path normalization fuzz cases (Windows separators, unicode edge cases).
Add conformance gate dependency on security attestation gate status.
Add combined quality gate that fails when conformance passes but security integrity fails.
Ensure security evidence is included in conformance artifact bundle.
Create machine-readable security SLO report from gate outputs.
Add trend-based alerts (degrading but not yet failing) for security metrics.
Add dashboard export artifacts per run.
Add gate for missing telemetry fields in security reports.
Enforce CODEOWNERS for `tooling/security/**`, `governance/security/**`, `.github/workflows/**`.
Require 2 approvals for changes touching security gates/policies/workflows.
Add PR gate that blocks direct changes to security baselines without linked ADR/ticket.
Add changelog entry gate for security-impacting changes.
Add scheduled tamper-e2e variants (policy tamper, provenance tamper, evidence index tamper).
Add periodic synthetic attack replay suite (token spray, replay burst, path traversal corpus).
Add chaos tests for partial writes and interrupted gate runs in CI-like environment.
Add consolidated security architecture document mapping gates -> controls -> evidence.
Add incident response runbook for each gate family failure.
Add emergency bypass process doc with explicit approvals and expiry.
Add operator quickstart for regenerating and validating signed policy/evidence artifacts.
Normalize all security gate output schemas (status/findings/summary/metadata).
Add a single `security-super-gate` orchestrator script for local and CI use.
Remove duplicate checks across workflows and centralize shared steps.
Add compatibility matrix doc (which gates run in CI vs maintenance vs release).
Add secure secret-scanning baseline updates workflow with mandatory human approval and signed baseline diffs.
Add deterministic SBOM reproducibility check (same inputs => byte-identical SBOM/provenance output).
Add provenance revocation list support for compromised signing keys/artifacts.
Add gate to verify no plaintext secrets appear in gate findings/reports before artifact upload.
Add minimum entropy and rotation-age enforcement for configured tokens/keys (policy-driven).
Add sandboxed subprocess policy wrapper for tooling scripts (allowlist commands + args pattern).
Add immutable audit-log archival and periodic restore verification drill.
Add tamper-evident monotonic sequence numbers to security evidence index entries.
Add policy for maximum allowed temporary waivers and automatic expiry gate.
Add emergency lock-down workflow that can disable risky operations (publish/replay) via signed policy toggle.
Eliminate security test skips by ensuring `semgrep` is available in all local/CI security test lanes (or replace skip with enforced precheck failure in strict mode).
Add a strict-mode variant of `security_super_gate` that hard-fails on missing external prerequisites (tools/secrets/evidence inputs) with actionable diagnostics.
Add a gate that asserts every security workflow uploads a complete, schema-valid security evidence bundle (including super-gate report and chain-of-custody index).
Add deterministic replay-abuse regression corpus that replays known abuse traces and verifies stable anomaly scoring outcomes across Python versions.
Add signed exception registry for temporary operational bypasses (distinct from waivers), including mandatory incident ticket, owner, expiry, and auto-close verification.
Add policy-backed maximum blast-radius controls for emergency lockdown toggles (which operations, which environments, max duration) plus rollback attestations.
Add continuous verification that all security-relevant JSON artifacts are canonicalized before signing and that canonical form is preserved after round-trip read/write.
Add golden tests for cross-platform file-permission semantics to catch drift between Linux/macOS runner behavior for sensitive outputs.
Add canary workflow that intentionally introduces controlled tamper cases each week and verifies that detection gates fail for the expected reason codes.
Add release-time check that all security docs referenced by runbooks/architecture remain link-valid and map to existing gates/policies/workflows.
Add mandatory signed SBOM diff review gate between consecutive releases, with fail-on-unexplained package addition/removal.
Add runtime egress policy gate (allowlisted domains/registries only) for release and maintenance workflows.
Add attestation freshness gate to fail if provenance/signature evidence is older than policy threshold at promotion time.
Add cryptographic algorithm policy gate (minimum key sizes, approved hash/signature suites, deprecation windows).
Add split-duty approval gate requiring distinct approvers for policy changes vs workflow execution unlocks.
Add offline verification bundle export (all signatures, manifests, revocation lists, verification script) for air-gapped audits.
Add dependency confusion guardrails: enforce internal package namespace policy and fail if unresolved internal names resolve externally.
Add gate to verify security-critical scripts run with locale/timezone-pinned deterministic settings in CI.
Add integrity checks for archived artifacts at rest (periodic hash revalidation against stored manifests).
Add simulation drill for compromised CI runner scenario with expected containment/detection evidence outputs.
Add cryptographic agility test matrix that validates signature verification behavior across planned algorithm migrations and key rollovers.
Add mandatory provenance witness quorum policy (independent verifiers) for release promotion.
Add immutable evidence transparency log export (append-only Merkle root snapshots) with periodic consistency verification gate.
Add secure time-source attestation gate to detect clock skew/tampering impact on expiry/freshness controls.
Add build-environment drift gate that fails when critical runner/toolchain fingerprints change without approved ticket.
Add policy-enforced sensitive artifact classification labels and retention-class validation for all uploaded artifacts.
Add deterministic redaction gate to ensure any secret-bearing findings are redacted with stable hashes before storage.
Add signed disaster-recovery drill evidence package (restore from cold backup + integrity/provenance verification).
Add mandatory dual-control key-destruction/compromise response drill with attested evidence and closure criteria.
Add cross-repo dependency trust gate for referenced actions/scripts to enforce ownership/maintainer allowlists.
Adopt strict JSON schema validation library for each endpoint and version schemas.
Reject unknown fields by default; require explicit allowlist for extension fields.
Add max payload size limits and nested depth limits per endpoint.
Add canonical input normalization prior to signing/hash checks.
Add fuzz tests for malformed JSON, boundary values, and schema-bypass attempts.
Add endpoint-level error code taxonomy and assert deterministic mapping in tests.
Add SSRF/path abuse checks for any endpoint accepting file paths/URLs.

sections.title: Runtime API Contract and Input Safety

items.text: Centralize all subprocess invocations behind `subprocess_policy.run_checked` (no direct subprocess use in security tooling).
Add argument-level allowlist patterns for risky commands (git/java/javac/python).
Add timeout, max-output-size, and exit-reason capture in subprocess policy.
Add audit report listing all allowed subprocess prefixes and callsites.
Add test to fail on new direct subprocess imports/calls in `tooling/security/**`.
Define promotion policy requiring quorum of: policy signature, provenance signature, evidence attestation, revocation clean.
Add policy-driven exception process for promotion override with signed expiry and owner.
Add release gate verifying attestations correspond exactly to built artifact digests.
Add “promotion dry-run” workflow producing full attestation set without publish.
Add rollback provenance gate to verify rollback artifacts are also attested.
Add workflow linter gate enforcing: pinned actions, permissions-minimum, no unguarded secrets usage.
Add denylist for risky workflow patterns (untrusted input in `run`, unpinned actions, broad tokens).
Add branch rule gate asserting required checks list includes all critical security gates.
Add periodic check for orphaned workflows not covered by security policy docs.
Add artifact retention policy assertion per workflow class (ci, release, maintenance).
Add semgrep self-check step to validate rules file parses and expected rules are active.
Add semgrep fixture suite expansion: true-positive and true-negative corpus with reason labels.
Add bandit baseline policy for acceptable residual findings with signed approval records.
Add mypy strictness ratchet for `tooling/security/**` and `runtime/glyphser/security/**`.
Add ruff rule profile for security code (imports/order/complexity caps).
Add SBOM signing and verification at generation time in CI and release.
Add dependency freshness policy with max age for known-vulnerable transitive packages.
Add policy gate for forbidden package maintainers or yanked releases.
Add provenance on lockfile changes requiring signed approval metadata.
Add periodic offline vulnerability snapshot comparison for reproducibility.
Add structured security event schema (`event_type`, `severity`, `control_id`, `run_id`, `artifact_ref`).
Add alert routing metadata in gate outputs (pager channel, urgency, playbook link).
Add SLO burn-rate calculation with fail/alert thresholds.
Add noise-control policy (dedup windows, suppression expiry, owner).
Add dashboard trend checks for silent failure patterns (no output, stale outputs, partial outputs).
Add incident bundle generator to collect all relevant signed evidence for a run.
Add “tabletop replay” command that re-evaluates a past run’s evidence locally.
Add explicit containment verification gate after emergency lockdown events.
Add post-incident closure gate requiring action items and verification artifacts.
Add recovery-time objective (RTO/RPO) measurement outputs in DR drill artifacts.
Add control catalog mapping: control -> gate -> workflow -> evidence artifact -> owner.
Add policy/gate lifecycle docs (propose, approve, deploy, rollback, deprecate).
Add architecture decision records for major hardening changes since current baseline.
Add runbook index health gate (all referenced files/commands must exist).
Add explicit `python -c "import pkg_resources"` check after security tool install in CI/security-maintenance.
Add explicit `semgrep --version` check after install and fail with actionable message if unavailable.
Add upload-artifact step for `semgrep.sarif` even when Code Scanning upload is skipped (fork PRs).
Add workflow assertion test: SARIF upload guarded for forks, not globally disabled.
Add workflow assertion test: `security-events: write` present on any job uploading SARIF.
Add workflow-trigger integrity gate for required CI and extended security workflow triggers/jobs.

Add policy exception mechanism for temporary action pin exemptions with expiry.
Add monthly workflow pin drift report with signed output.
Introduce `schema_version` in all newly written security reports.
Create migration tracker for legacy gates missing `findings/summary/metadata`.
Add compatibility layer test suite covering old/new schema coexistence.
Define “strict schema mode” toggle for future enforcement date.
Add release criterion that blocks strict mode enablement until migration threshold met.
Add signature verification for every uploaded security artifact listed in workflow artifact paths.
Add gate to detect unsigned JSON files under run-scoped `evidence/security` when policy requires signature.
Add key provenance continuity checks between `policy_signature`, `provenance_signature`, and attestation index.
Add gate enforcing signature algorithm policy from governance (no deprecated algorithms).
Add signed “verification summary” artifact for auditors.
Add CI check that revoked signatures/digests are not present in current run artifacts.
Add key rotation cadence gate (max age threshold, signed rotation record required).
Add staged key-rollover test scenario (old key accepted only during defined transition window).
Add dual-control approval evidence for key compromise toggles.
Add emergency key disable path test with restoration proof.
Add endpoint-specific request body size ceilings and reject overly large payloads.
Add quota burst protection using sliding window and token/job dimensions.
Add policy-backed response shaping to avoid sensitive internal diagnostics leakage.
Add stronger path guard checks for checkpoint/restore and migration paths (absolute/relative traversal).
Add replay token lifecycle enforcement (mint, use, expiry, revocation) with test matrix.
Add telemetry schema validation gate for `runtime_api_state.json` snapshot.
Add mandatory counters for auth failures, quota rejections, and denied scopes.
Add anomaly false-positive/false-negative benchmark scenarios.
Add per-profile threshold checks (`ci`, `staging`, `release`) with policy signature verification.
Add trend anomaly alert artifact with suggested remediation fields.
Add file permission hardening checks for all generated evidence files (owner-only where required).
Add symlink and hardlink attack detection for artifact write paths.
Add temp directory policy gate (`mktemp` alternatives, secure cleanup verification).
Add path normalization checks for unicode-confusable and mixed-separator edge cases.
Add restore-from-archive verification that rejects unsafe members before extraction.
Add separate workflow `security-super-extended.yml` scheduled weekly.
Persist extended run artifacts under dedicated run-scoped evidence root.
Add comparison report: core vs extended failures with classification (sequencing vs true defect).
Add requirement that any extended failure older than N days becomes core blocker unless exception signed.
Add tests validating membership lists do not silently shrink.
Add mutation tests for critical policy gates (policy_signature, provenance_signature, evidence_attestation).
Add property-based tests for path and schema validators.
Add runner-matrix tests for Linux/macOS parity on filesystem and permissions gates.
Add “exception swallowing” detector test on all security scripts (`except: pass` banned).
Add CI meta-gate verifying coverage threshold specifically for `tooling/security/**`.
Add runbook section per gate: purpose, inputs, outputs, fail reasons, triage steps.
Add “known CI failure modes” troubleshooting guide (SARIF permissions, Semgrep runtime deps, signing key missing).
Add architecture diagram for evidence flow from gate -> report -> signature -> upload.
Add operator checklist for emergency lockdown and rollback with required signed artifacts.
Add quarterly review cadence with signed review records for security governance docs.
Add offline verification script that validates all signatures and hash chains without network access.
Add independent verifier profile (read-only role) and evidence proving verification can be run by non-maintainers.
Add export package digest for every uploaded artifact bundle.
Add long-term retention manifest with immutable digest and storage location.
Add periodic external audit simulation workflow and closure artifact.
Add threat-to-control matrix with stable control IDs and evidence pointers.
Add gate that fails if a threat model control has no implementing gate/workflow.
Add gate that fails if a critical gate has no mapped threat/control owner.
Add periodic drift check between threat model metadata and workflow wiring.
Add signed threat model change attestations for critical control changes.

sections.title: Threat Model and Security Requirements Traceability

items.text: Add schema validation for all governance/security policy JSON before signature checks.
Add policy semantic validation (cross-field rules, numeric ranges, allowed enums).
Add “exception debt” gate: fail when active exceptions exceed policy debt budget.
Add mandatory justification quality checks (minimum content fields) for waivers/exceptions.
Add owner/expiry SLA gate (no ownerless or unbounded exception lifetime).
Remove silent fallback defaults in production paths; require explicit config for risky behaviors.
Add gate that blocks fallback secret usage outside local/dev contexts.
Add environment profile policy (`dev/ci/staging/prod`) with strict default inheritance rules.
Add fail-closed checks for missing mandatory evidence in release/promotion lanes.
Add explicit “degraded mode” evidence artifact whenever non-blocking fallback is used.

sections.title: Secure Defaults and Safe Fallback Strategy

items.text: Add deployment freeze gate tied to unresolved critical security findings.
Add canary promotion guard that requires successful security checks on canary slice first.
Add rollback readiness gate verifying artifact availability + provenance + compatibility.
Add policy for max allowed drift between build attestations and deploy-time artifacts.
Add signed deploy decision record linking run ID, approvers, and evidence bundle digest.
Add rolling Merkle root checkpoints across run-scoped security artifacts.
Add gate to verify continuity of Merkle checkpoints across workflow stages.
Add tamper cost model report (time-to-detect, blast radius, required trust assumptions).

Add immutable index of uploaded artifact names/sizes/digests to detect omission attacks.
Add secret origin inventory (who/where/how provisioned) with periodic recertification.
Add gate to ensure all required secrets have rotation metadata and last-rotated timestamps.
Add stale-secret usage detection in workflow env wiring.
Add break-glass secret usage gate requiring incident ticket and signed after-action report.
Add test that strict-key workflows fail clearly when secrets are missing (no ambiguous errors).
Add policy for disallowing network egress in gates that do not require it.
Add gate to detect accidental network calls in nominally offline verification scripts.
Add sandbox boundary tests for file write locations (deny outside allowed roots).
Add process isolation assertions for risky parsing/verification routines.
Add memory/resource budget guardrails for heavy security scans to prevent resource DoS.
Add telemetry completeness SLI (required fields present rate) and enforce threshold.
Add telemetry timeliness SLI (artifact available within target minutes).
Add telemetry integrity SLI (signed reports ratio) and trend alerts.
Add discrepancy detector between gate stdout status and persisted report status.
Add cross-gate consistency checks (e.g., super-gate status aligns with component statuses).
Add split-role enforcement: code author cannot be sole approver for security-critical changes.
Add gate for approval freshness (approvals invalidated by post-approval security file changes).
Add emergency override policy with dual-approval and auto-expiration enforcement.
Add reviewer competency mapping (required reviewer group per control domain).
Add periodic audit report of approval policy violations and remediation state.
Add security incident regression catalog linking incident -> failing control -> added test.
Add gate that checks each high-severity incident has at least one permanent regression test.
Add historical CI failure classifier for recurring security workflow issues.
Add monthly “top recurring failures” report with owner/action ETA.
Add closure verification gate: resolved recurring issue must stay green for N runs.
Add security gate smoke matrix on Linux/macOS for tooling parity.
Add policy for approved Python minor versions and drift warning before EOL.
Add deterministic hash equivalence checks across OS for signed JSON artifacts.
Add locale variance test suite (C.UTF-8 vs en_US.UTF-8) for parsing-sensitive gates.
Add filesystem case-sensitivity conflict checks for artifact paths.
Add allowlist for external action owners with signed policy and drift gate.
Add verification that third-party action SHAs still map to expected upstream commits.
Add dependency provenance checks for downloaded security tools/wheels.
Add mirror/source failover policy with integrity equivalence checks.
Add “air-gap simulation” lane to validate offline verification viability end-to-end.
Add per-gate runtime budget and trend regression gate (detect sudden scan-time spikes).
Add caching strategy with integrity verification (cache poisoning resistant).
Add partial rerun capability for non-dependent gates with deterministic aggregation.
Add queue/backpressure policy for scheduled hardening workflows.
Add reliability dashboard for security pipeline MTTR/flake rate.

sections.title: Performance, Cost, and Reliability Engineering for Security Gates

items.text: Add yearly security control recertification workflow with signed output.
Add policy deprecation workflow (sunset date, replacement controls, migration evidence).
Add ownership continuity checks (no unowned policy/gate/workflow).
Add archive retention and legal hold policy tests for security artifacts.
Add executive summary export of security posture with machine-verifiable references.
Add formal invariants for critical security state transitions (waiver expiry, exception closure, promotion eligibility).
Add model-based tests for gate orchestration dependencies and failure propagation.
Add proof-oriented checks for deterministic signature verification behavior under key-rotation states.
Add machine-checked assertions that required controls cannot be bypassed by workflow condition edits.
Add periodic formal review artifact signed by security owner.
Add gate that enforces every TODO section item has an owner and target milestone when moved to in-progress.
Add policy gate requiring explicit risk acceptance record for any intentionally deferred hardening item.
Add change-management gate that blocks merging security workflow changes without linked policy diff or rationale.
Add auto-generated compliance delta report between current repo state and required control baseline.

Add anomaly detector for unusual gate-status transitions (e.g., chronic WARN to sudden PASS) as tamper signal.
Add cross-run linkage checks for repeated suspicious patterns in telemetry and evidence artifacts.
Add containment auto-trigger recommendations in gate outputs for severe findings.
Add incident severity scoring rubric integrated into security reports.
Add post-incident quality gate verifying corrective actions are test-backed.
Add evidence notarization checkpoint for long-term archival trust.
Add retention integrity audits (spot-check restored evidence against signed manifests).
Add immutable manifest of manifest pointers for run bundles (meta-manifest chain).
Add policy for archival encryption at rest verification with key custody metadata.
Add restore simulation for randomly selected historic runs every quarter.
Add local preflight script that validates required env/tool prerequisites before running security gates.
Add fail-fast diagnostics for common local failures (missing keys, missing tools, stale policies).
Add secure developer-mode profile that keeps strict checks but uses explicit mock attestations.
Add docs for deterministic local reproduction of CI security lane.
Add gate to ensure helper scripts do not silently downgrade enforcement.
Add aggregate “go/no-go” promotion report with weighted control outcomes and mandatory blockers.
Add policy-backed thresholds for acceptable WARN categories by environment.
Add signed decision artifact capturing exact blockers bypassed (if any) and approval chain.
Add gate ensuring release notes include security control status summary.
Add reproducible evidence package checksum embedded in release metadata.
Add action provenance verification for GitHub Actions dependencies where feasible.
Add lockfile provenance checks for transitive security tool dependencies.
Add binary/source consistency checks for critical security tooling installs.
Add policy gate for disallowed package metadata anomalies (suspicious maintainer/email/domain drift).
Add mirrored-source integrity comparison report for package fetches.
Add chaos scenarios for intermittent network outages during security tool install and verify fail-safe behavior.
Add chaos scenarios for partial artifact upload and ensure detection/reporting.
Add chaos scenarios for corrupted signatures and malformed attestations in promotion workflows.
Add gate retry strategy policy (which gates may retry, max attempts, deterministic constraints).
Add reliability budget tracking for security workflows (flake budget and burn-down).

items.text: Add gate verifying branch protection settings match policy-required checks and review rules.

sections.title: Long-Term Maintenance and Technical Debt Controls

items.text: Add gate that validates every security gate is itself covered by at least one test file.
Add gate that validates every security workflow step maps to a documented control ID.
Add gate that validates every signed policy has an active owner and review date.
Add gate that validates no security report artifact is produced without run-scoped pathing in CI contexts.
Add drift detector for TODO-vs-repo reality (implemented controls not yet checked off, and vice versa).
Add policy review freshness gate for all governance/security JSON and markdown artifacts.
Add gate to flag stale test fixtures not updated after gate logic changes.
Add release handshake artifact requiring explicit acknowledgment from security + release owners.
Add post-release verification checklist artifact proving all mandatory security uploads are retrievable.
Add rollback handshake artifact requiring provenance + policy-signature revalidation.
Add command wrappers for common security workflows that pre-validate environment and secrets before execution.
